code: import React,{useEffect,useState}from'react';import{Link}from'react-router-dom';import axios from'axios';import{useAuth}from'../context/AuthContext';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";export default function WatchlistPage(){const{API,getHeaders}=useAuth();const[items,setItems]=useState([]);useEffect(()=>{axios.get(`${API}/users/watchlist`,{headers:getHeaders()}).then(res=>setItems(res.data||[])).catch(()=>setItems([]));},[API]);return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("main",{className:"page",style:{padding:'100px 24px 32px'},children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h1",{className:"section-title",children:"My Watchlist"}),!items.length?/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{style:{color:'var(--text-dim)'},children:"Your watchlist is empty."}):/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("section",{style:{display:'grid',gridTemplateColumns:'repeat(auto-fill, minmax(180px, 1fr))',gap:'14px'},children:items.map(movie=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(Link,{to:`/movie/${movie._id}`,className:"movie-card",style:{height:'280px'},children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("img",{src:movie.thumbnail,alt:movie.title,loading:"lazy"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"card-overlay",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"card-title",children:movie.title})})]},movie._id))})]});}
